details.test: Task 1: Cheapest 20' FCL quote under 3000 and start booking
Task 2: LCL shipment with transit and price filters
Task 3: Door pickup trucking option under 400
Task 4: Earliest-arriving vessel schedule saved to watchlist
Task 5: Track shipment and save with nickname
Task 6: Find customs documentation guide and bookmark it
Task 7: Compare warehousing costs and request quote at cheaper location
Task 8: Door-to-door cost estimate with insurance, customs, and last-mile
Task 9: Create business profile and set default shipping preferences
